news.t: IShares ESG fund suffered 91% drop in assets under management this week

holdings.infoBox: LDEM is an equity ETF with a total of 489 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 6.17%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.09%, Tencent Holdings at 4.70%, Alibaba Group Holding at 3.86%, and Delta Electronics at 2.86%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG MSCI EM Leaders ETF (LDEM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EM Extended ESG Leaders index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index composed of large- and mid-cap emerging-market stocks with high environmental, social, and governance traits relative to their sector peers. LDEM was launched on Feb 5, 2020 and is issued by BlackRock.
